name: Accura Luxury 55 Motor Yacht
tagline: Premium luxury motor yacht for ultimate comfort and style
summary: The flagship of our fleet. Experience Bali's waters in unparalleled luxury aboard the Accura 55, perfect for larger groups and special occasions.
description: The Accura Luxury 55 Motor Yacht is our premium vessel designed for those who seek the finest maritime experience in Bali. With its spacious deck areas, modern amenities, and exceptional craftsmanship, this yacht sets the standard for luxury private charters.
facilities: 1x Toilet, 2x Berth, Sound System, Kitchen, Air Conditioning, WiFi, Snorkeling Equipment, Fishing Tools
safety: Sea Safe Tracking, Satellite Phone, Life Craft, Life Jackets, Life Rings, Insurance covered by Jasa Raharja Putra
included: Towels, Snorkeling accessories, Fishing equipment, Water, tea, coffee and non-alcoholic drinks
optionalExtras: Transfer, Diving accessories, Surfing accessories, Restaurant lunch at island, Professional photographer, DJ with equipment, Alcoholic drinks, Fresh fruits & snacks
pricingNotes: Nusa Dua 4hrs: Rp 35,000,000 | Nusa Penida/Lembongan 8hrs: Rp 45,000,000 | Lombok/Gili 8hrs: Rp 76,000,000
paymentPolicy: 50% deposit required. Full payment before trip. IDR currencies only.
cancellationPolicy: Low season: 50% within 7 days | High season: 50% within 30 days | Within 7 days: 100% | Weather: 25%
